title: Simple Planked Wood Bed
summary: A clean planked bed from 2x4s and 1x6s — planked headboard and footboard on chunky legs, with a slat platform. Straightforward pocket-hole joinery.
description:
A simple, sturdy bed with a planked headboard and footboard framed by chunky 2x4 legs, side rails, and a 2x slat platform — no box spring needed. It's an approachable first bed: everything joins with a pocket-hole jig, and the plank panels are just 1x6s ganged together.

Keep all the pocket holes on the back side of the headboard and footboard so the finished faces stay clean. Build the panels first, add the 2x4 legs, then build the footboard the same way. The side rails tie the two ends together.

One piece of assembly wisdom worth heeding: finish the bed before you move it into the room, and attach the side rails in place. A fully assembled bed is often too big to get through a doorway, so building it to knock down at the side rails saves you dismantling it later. Set the slats across and screw them down with 2" screws, spacing them per your mattress maker's recommendation.

cutList.note: Quantity and spacing per your mattress.

steps.title: Build the headboard
steps.body: Build the planked headboard with the pocket-hole jig, keeping all pocket holes on the back side so the front face stays clean.

steps.title: Attach the legs
steps.body: Attach the 2x4 legs to the headboard panel, again keeping fasteners to the back.

steps.title: Build the footboard
steps.body: Build the footboard the same way as the headboard — panel, legs, and the 2x6 rail.

steps.title: Attach the side rails
steps.body: Attach the side rails to the headboard and footboard. Consider finishing the bed first and moving it into the room before attaching the side rails — a fully assembled bed often won't fit through a door, so building it to knock down at the rails is the smart move.

steps.title: Add the slats
steps.body: Place the slats across the rails and screw them down with 2" screws, spacing them per your mattress manufacturer's recommendation. Sand and finish.

images.alt: Simple planked wood bed with 2x4 legs and a slat platform
